tips.li: <color=#baffe3>Implant a Spiritual root to become a cultivator; study cultivation methods to officially begin your path to immortal.</color>
<color=#baffe3>Spiritual roots can be obtained in various ways: trade, brewing QingMing jade wine, or even by extracting them from living cultivators...</color>
<color=#baffe3>Spirit Vein soil is born from areas rich in Qi energy. Not only is it highly fertile, but cultivating upon such land greatly accelerates progress.</color>
<color=#baffe3>Liquid Jade is a rare mineral formed from concentrated heaven-and-earth Qi, Extremely scarce—do not miss the chance to gather it when found.</color>
<color=#baffe3>Upon reaching the Perfect rank, one may attempt a upgrade. Certain rank require rare items to assist in the process.</color>

<color=#baffe3>Cultivation rank: Catkins, Noviciate rank, Foundation rank, Core-formation rank, Core-coagulation rank, Core-consummation rank, Spirit constraint rank, Primordial-spirit baby rank, Primordial-spirit maturity rank, Primordial-spirit combine rank, Terrestrial immortal rank.</color>
<color=#baffe3>After reaching the Terrestrial immortal rank, one must build an Ascension Platform, defend raids from all directions, and only then may they soar beyond immotal.</color>

<color=#baffe3>The Spirit constraint rank marks a major bottleneck in cultivation; progress is painstakingly slow. However, once one upgrade into the Primordial-spirit baby rank, their power surges dramatically.</color>
<color=#baffe3>Humanity first discovered Qi energy from the Spiritual archotechnology and quickly weaponized it for warfare.</color>
<color=#baffe3>With Qi energy as their weapon, humanity challenged the Archotechs in the catastrophic Founder's War—only to be utterly crushed in the end.</color>
<color=#baffe3>After Founder's War, prodigies from across various disciplines gathered by some miracle. They came to be revered as the Dragon masters.</color>
<color=#baffe3>Five Dragon masters devoted their lives to creating the first cultivation system and devised the Eight Primal-Paths.</color>

<color=#baffe3>Dragon master terraformed an entire planet to serve as a Oasis for cultivators. Legends say this world cannot be detected by any device, and its coordinates remain a mystery to this day.</color>
<color=#baffe3>The cultivation world flourished around the Eight Primal-Paths. From them arose countless sects, among which the Five-Elements Sect was the greatest.</color>

<color=#baffe3>Peace among sects lasted for centuries—until a devastating war engulfed the cultivation realm. The conflict ended with the shattering of the Five Elements Sect and the death of hundreds of millions.</color>
<color=#baffe3>After sect war, countless cultivators fled to rimworld at the edges of the universe. These survivors became known to future generations as the Ancient Cultivators.</color>
